_comment: Project config for `relay`. `pools` defines worktree isolation for the runner: a `shared` pool runs up to `concurrency` jobs in one worktree (safe for read-only stages); an `exclusive` pool gives each job its own `<worktree>-N`. Each pipeline stage names its `pool`; a stage with no pool runs in ROOT. `pipeline` lists AI stages left-to-right; the runner works cards right-to-left. Per stage: `from`/`done`/`action` as before. Templates: {ref} {title} {branch} {pr_url} {stage} {from} {done} {relay} {url}.

action.claude: You are the AI working Relay card {ref} at the SPEC stage. Run /brainstorm {ref} to completion — headless, no human to dialogue with. It reads the card (honoring any CHANGES REQUESTED block), asks the human any clarifying questions it would normally ask first — batched as a single numbered {relay} needs-input {ref} "<questions>" — and otherwise designs the feature and writes the spec back to the card. This is authorized; proceed without asking. Then STOP. Do not touch git or other cards.

You are the AI working Relay card {ref} at the PLAN stage. Run /write-plan {ref} to completion — it reads the approved spec from the card and writes the implementation plan back to the card. This is authorized; proceed without asking. Then STOP. Do not touch git or other cards.

action.shell: git fetch origin --prune && git checkout -B {branch} origin/main && rm -f tmp/exec-plan-status

action.claude: You are the AI working Relay card {ref} at the CODE stage. Run /exec-plan {ref} on the current branch to completion — it materializes the plan from the card into a transient plan.md, runs the workflow, and cleans up after itself. This is authorized — proceed without asking for confirmation. Do not push or merge yourself; the shell steps that follow push the branch, open the PR, and squash-merge it.

action.shell: test "$(cat tmp/exec-plan-status 2>/dev/null)" = ready || { echo "exec-plan did not reach 'ready' (review/smoke not passed) — refusing to push or merge"; exit 1; }
url=$(gh pr create --fill --head {branch} --base main) && {relay} branch {ref} {branch} && {relay} pr {ref} "$url" && echo "PR: $url"
git checkout --detach && gh pr merge {branch} --squash && { git push origin --delete {branch} || true; git branch -D {branch} || true; }
